vision.statement: Ecosystem OS — AI-native company operating system (category product + dogfood narrative)

mission: Make proof, coordination, and delivery governable for humans and agents in regulated trade — evidence over vendor trust.

northStarMetric.name: Governed operating loop complete
northStarMetric.target: Graph state + Ledger evidence + Assurance score + Surface command trace

valueProposition.for: founders, operators, product teams, agent teams, and ecosystem builders
valueProposition.who: need to run complex human-agent organizations
valueProposition.that: provides the operating substrate for intelligence, coordination, delivery, services, assurance, human doctrine, innovation, and market expression
valueProposition.unlike: standalone PM, RPA, AI-agent, wiki, and workflow tools
valueProposition.we: connect Graph, Kernel, Ledger, and Surface into one company operating platform

activeMilestone.title: ECO-OS-SHIP-001 — ship · surfaces · GTM · operational AI
activeMilestone.shippableOutcome: GR-T2 pilot narrative live; Ecosystem OS category in market; fleet eats operating model while markets M4 + gtcx surfaces ship.

acceptanceChecks.label: Shipping — markets golden transaction + gtcx surfaces on path
GTM — Ecosystem OS portfolio narrative current
AI OS operational — agile-os P22 loop green

productGoals.title: Fleet documentation home
productGoals.outcome: Operators find current fleet docs without owner-repo drift

gtmGoals.title: Ecosystem OS portfolio narrative
gtmGoals.outcome: GR-T2 pilot narrative live in market
gtmGoals.measure: Portfolio doc current + quarter GTM check

milestone: quarter pillar acceptance checks pass or explicit waiver
forbidden: done on doc-only milestone without ship path
